creator: cz@aegisnet.de
text:
I have installed a Freebsd 9-RC3 w/o IPv4 into a Virtualbox VM. IPv6 connectivity works fine (installed the system from the net after a boot from the boot only iso). However, sysinstall errors with 'Network is unreachable' on whichever IPv6 mirror site I choose.

It's probably trying to connect via v4. v6 works on the machine


$ ping6 ftp.freebsd.org
PING6(56=40+8+8 bytes) 2002:XXXXX:XXXX --> 2001:4f8:0:2::e
16 bytes from 2001:4f8:0:2::e, icmp_seq=0 hlim=58 time=172.747 ms
^C
